originalTitle: Are Man City now title favourites after win over Arsenal?
originalDescription: Erling Haaland's winning goal, the explosion of noise, the reaction at full-time - are Man City now favourites to win the Premier League title?

originalTitle: Man City beat Arsenal to close gap in title race
originalDescription: Erling Haaland and Rayan Cherki strike as Manchester City beat league leaders Arsenal to close the gap to three points with a game in hand and pile more pressure on Mikel Arteta's side.

originalTitle: Arteta must prove he won't be remembered as Arsenal's 'nearly man'
originalDescription: Arsenal and manager Mikel Arteta may still have a season of glory - but must prove they are not 'nearly men' after Manchester City loss, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

originalTitle: Dream derby result for Liverpool fans but huge summer ahead for Slot
originalDescription: Liverpool's 100th-minute winner at Everton moves the Reds closer to a Champions League spot - but issues still remain.

originalTitle: 'By chance or choice, they have clicked' - why Man City will be champions
originalDescription: Match of the Day pundit Danny Murphy explains why he thinks Manchester City will beat Arsenal to the Premier League title.

originalTitle: Record-breaking Bayern win Bundesliga - now for the Treble
originalDescription: Free-scoring Bayern Munich swept to the German title for the 35th time. Now their sights turn towards completing the Treble.

originalTitle: Why evergreen Forrest is Celtic's enduring influencer
originalDescription: Veteran winger James Forrest remains Celtic's constant, the great survivor and the enduring influencer, writes Tom English.

originalTitle: Arsenal & Chelsea keen on Bergvall - Monday's gossip
originalDescription: Arsenal and Chelsea are among the clubs interested in Tottenham's Lucas Bergvall, while Paris St-Germain hold talks with Arsenal's Gabriel Martinelli.

originalTitle: 'Panic on the streets of London' - How do Arsenal recover from this?
originalDescription: "Panic on the streets of London," read the Manchester City banner at full-time. With his hair down, Erling Haaland was singing Flo Rida's: "Oh, sometimes, I get a good feeling.". We've all heard those songs before.

originalTitle: The title-race verdict: Guardiola, Arteta, players and pundits have their say
originalDescription: Arsenal are still top of the Premier League - but Manchester City landed a big blow in the title race by winning the top-two showdown at the Etihad on Sunday.

originalTitle: Bayern win Bundesliga as Kane scores in league-sealing win
Monumental win for Man City as Arsenal’s lead cut to three points
originalDescription: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Manchester City’s match against Arsenal in the Premier League.

originalTitle: DeChambeau withdraws mid-tournament from LIV Golf Mexico City
originalDescription: Bryson DeChambeau has withdrawn from LIV Golf Mexico City, ahead of the final round, due to a wrist injury.

originalTitle: Man City blow title race wide open with enthralling Arsenal win
originalDescription: Manchester City blew the Premier League title race wide open by edging an epic game 2-1 at the Etihad Stadium to move within three points of long-time leaders Arsenal - and hold a game advantage with which to close that gap.

originalTitle: Haaland and Gabriel go head-to-head - should Arsenal defender have seen red?
originalDescription: Erling Haaland and Gabriel Magalhaes go head-to-head in Manchester City's Premier League clash with Arsenal - but should Gabriel have seen red?

originalTitle: Another twist! Haaland gives Man City the lead again
originalDescription: Erling Haaland gives Manchester City the lead in their Premier League clash with Arsenal.
